hooks.text: Your supplier quotes you in US dollars. Your supplier does not actually want US dollars. Both things are true at the same time.
There is a reason your Chinese supplier never asks to be paid in their own currency, even though it would help them. Most business owners never find out.
Chinese suppliers quietly pad US dollar quotes by 2 to 5 percent to cover the currency risk. Ask for the CNY price and that padding has no reason to exist.
A factory owner opens another US dollar wire, sighs, and ticks the calendar ten days forward for his bank to clear it. He never tells the buyer this.
Every order you pay in US dollars, you hand back a 1 to 3 percent discount your supplier would gladly give for being paid in their own currency.
